content.speakerText: You’re all set—just email me if anything’s unclear.
content.speakerTextCn: 你都搞定了，有不清楚的随时邮件我。
expectedAnswers: Thanks so much—you’ve been a huge help!
I really appreciate your help. I’ll reach out if I have questions.
That’s awesome, thank you! I’ll email you if I get stuck.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了感谢
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'thanks', 'help', 或 'email' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: We’ll send your diploma in 6–8 weeks after conferral.
content.speakerTextCn: 学位授予后6到8周寄出毕业证。
expectedAnswers: Thanks for walking me through this!
Got it, thanks! I’ll keep an eye on my inbox.
I really appreciate you handling this for me.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了对流程指导的感谢
语言准确性：动词和时态是否正确
表达自然度：是否避免了抱怨或催促语气
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'thanks', 'appreciate', 'walk me through' 等表达
